author: codex

patch.value:
Implementation notes:
- Add repository license text matching package.json.
- Add release verification scripts for type-checking, tests, production dependency audit, package dry-run, and changelog freshness.
- Expand GitHub Actions CI to run the same release gates on push and pull requests.
- Keep dist tracked because pm package installs from GitHub must work without a build step.
Harden npm package metadata and CI release gates
Ensure pm-changelog has complete package metadata, an explicit MIT license, deterministic TypeScript emission, and CI checks that catch release regressions before merge.

- LICENSE exists and matches the MIT declaration in package.json.
- npm scripts expose release:check, audit:prod, and pack:dry-run.
- CI runs type check, tests, production audit, package dry-run, and changelog check using free GitHub Actions features.
- TypeScript does not emit dist output when compilation has errors.

message: Create CI and metadata hardening feature

patch.value: Added LICENSE, release verification npm scripts, strict TypeScript emit policy, and expanded GitHub Actions CI release gates.
Repository now has MIT license text, release:check/audit:prod/pack:dry-run scripts, noEmitOnError=true, and CI jobs for type check, tests, production audit, package dry-run, and changelog check.

value.author: codex
value.text: Verification evidence: npm run check passed after changes; npm test and release:check will run after changelog regeneration.

patch.value: Release metadata, compiler policy, and CI gates meet production-readiness requirements and are reproducible from npm scripts.
Release metadata and CI hardening implemented; verification evidence recorded and final release gate covers this path.
